title: [codereview-pass1] coap_dtn.c readability fix
description: Post-edit review pass 1: coap_dtn.c:1-71 now has logical blank lines after includes, between functions, proper bracing and indentation matching coap_location.c and coap_status.c. No dead code introduced. Mutex handling consistent. P3: coap_respond still duplicated across 6 coap_*.c files (DRY violation). codereview
close_reason: Convergence after 3 codereview passes per chunk on sales-playbook.md/test, coap_dtn.c readability+macros, SCHC table move to appendix. All P0-P4 findings filed and fixed. No dead code. Conventional commit prepared but not executed per policy. Quality gates: ruff clean, west native_sim builds clean.
